# Compact Wearable Gateway System

Generate an editable device system diagram package for a compact wearable gateway. The editable draw.io master is the source of truth; SVG, PPTX, and PNG are derived artifacts.

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  WearableSensor["Wearable Sensor\nBLE"] --> BLEGateway["BLE Gateway\nESP32-S3"]
  BLEGateway --> LocalDisplay["Local OLED Display"]
  BLEGateway --> LTEModem["LTE-M Modem"]
  LTEModem --> CloudBroker["Cloud MQTT Broker"]
  BLEGateway --> PowerBlock["PMIC + LiPo Battery"]
  USBC["USB-C Service Port"] --> BLEGateway
  BLEGateway --> SecureElement["ATECC608 Secure Element"]
```

Required package:
- diagram_input.yaml with pages, nodes, edges, labels, grouping hints, and export metadata.
- editable .drawio master with one page named `system_overview`.
- SVG export from draw.io, not a hand-written replacement.
- PPTX slide containing the SVG.
- PNG preview exported from the PPTX.
- validation notes covering required output existence and known local-tool blockers.
boundary: Public synthetic fixture only; no REF packets, private workspaces, secrets, or project raw input.
